description: Rescue — high urgency, full contact info, clear location

needcard.description_clean: Three people trapped on rooftop at 45 MG Road after flood waters rose. Ground floor completely submerged. No food or water for 8 hours.
needcard.urgency_reasoning: Life threat: people stranded with rising water, 8+ hours without supplies.
needcard.location_text_raw: 45 MG Road, near old post office, Ward 3

description: Food — Hindi language brief, medium urgency

needcard.description_clean: 40 families in Ward 12 have had no food for 2 days. Children and elderly badly affected.
needcard.urgency_reasoning: 40 families, 2 days without food, children involved — serious but not immediately fatal.

description: Medical — critical, no contact info, no confirmed location

needcard.description_clean: Diabetic patients at relief camp have run out of insulin. Life threatening for multiple patients.
needcard.urgency_reasoning: Missing insulin for diabetics is life-threatening within hours.

description: Water — Bengali language, contamination, full details

needcard.description_clean: Drinking water supply contaminated after flooding. 55 people affected, children showing diarrhoea symptoms.
needcard.urgency_reasoning: Water-borne illness already developing in children. Urgent purification needed.

description: Shelter — volunteer has mismatched skills, brief should still be useful

needcard.description_clean: Family of 6 including a 3-month-old infant. House collapsed overnight. Currently exposed outside near Durga Mandir Sector 5.
needcard.urgency_reasoning: Infant and elderly exposed to elements. High urgency but not immediately fatal.

description: Logistics — low urgency, no supplies to bring, concise

needcard.description_clean: 200 boxes of dry rations need transport from Industrial Area Phase 2 warehouse to Stadium Ground relief camp.
needcard.urgency_reasoning: Logistics coordination — important but no immediate life threat.
needcard.location_text_raw: Industrial Area Phase 2, Warehouse Block C

description: Medical — snake bite, extreme urgency, time-sensitive

needcard.description_clean: 8-year-old child bitten by snake in Mohalla Purana Qila. Antivenom urgently needed. Family has no vehicle. Nearest hospital 15km away.
needcard.urgency_reasoning: Child snakebite — antivenom window is 1-4 hours. Life-threatening.

description: Other — mental health, soft skills, no physical supplies

needcard.description_clean: 200 flood survivors at Sadar Hospital camp experiencing severe trauma. Children especially affected. Mental health and emotional support needed.
needcard.urgency_reasoning: Mental health crisis is serious but not immediately life-threatening. Respond today.

description: Rescue — mass casualty, multiple skills, complex scenario

needcard.description_clean: Approximately 50 workers trapped under debris at Industrial Estate Plot 7, Phase 3 after building collapse. Fire brigade on site but more rescue teams and paramedics urgently needed.
needcard.urgency_reasoning: 50 people trapped under debris — highest possible urgency. Every minute counts.

description: Food — Marathi language, high count, cooking skills available

needcard.description_clean: Hospital kitchen equipment damaged. 120 patients and 50 staff need cooked food for the next 24 hours.
needcard.urgency_reasoning: Hospital patients need food — not immediately fatal but urgent and high count.
needcard.location_text_raw: District General Hospital, Kitchen Block B
